docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,073.52 FILED BY CORCORDIA ARGONAUT AS TO DEFENDANT HILBORN, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORCORDIA ARGONAUT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES KATZ--MEMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED SEP-05-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HILBORN, JEFFREY
